title: Tasty Ukrainian Corn Flatbread
description: A sweet and light Ukrainian dish featuring corn arepa filled with mozzarella cheese, perfect for a solo dinner.

ingredients.name: deglassing liquid
ingredients.notes: such as white wine or stock

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the cornmeal, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add in the water, stirring with a fork until the dough comes together.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it is smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 2 equal pieces and shape into balls.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle, about 1/4 inch thick.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and cook the flatbreads for 2-3 minutes on each side, until lightly browned.
Transfer the flatbreads to a baking sheet and top with mozzarella cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and brush with melted butter and deglassing liquid.

axes.primaryIngredient: corn arepa filled with mozarella cheese
